tool_args.label: C&D achieved record $15.8B in contract commitments in 2025

payload.claim_text: C&D achieved a record $15.8 billion in contract commitments, more than doubling the five-year average
payload.subject: MTA C&D

tool_args.label: C&D identified $1.2B in additional savings over past year

payload.claim_text: C&D identified an additional $1.2 billion in savings over the past year, including approximately $760 million through value engineering, $250 million through competitive procurement, $150 million from projects delivered below budgeted risk projections, and $60 million from improved project management practices
payload.subject: MTA C&D

tool_args.label: MTA not received FTA reimbursements for ~7 months on SAS Phase 2

payload.claim_text: MTA has not received reimbursements from the Federal Transit Administration for approximately seven months despite having a formal funding agreement in place for the Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 project
payload.subject: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2

warnings: claim.routes is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route arrays should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.claim_text: January 2026 performance was favorable by $89 million compared to budget
payload.subject: MTA

tool_args.label: Jamaica Bus Terminal Replacement Facility lease modification

payload.claim_text: Board approved modified lease terms for Jamaica Bus Terminal Replacement Facility, with base rent increasing from $3.1M to $4M annually in Years 1-5, and the lessor providing $1.25M fit-out contribution, elimination of market-rate rent adjustment in Year 51, and reduction of purchase option to 80% of fair market value
payload.subject: Jamaica Bus Terminal

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal 113th Anniversary

payload.description: Grand Central Terminal's 113th anniversary - first opened February 2, 1913

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison opening enabled connectivity

payload.description: With the opening of Grand Central Madison, it is now easier than ever to connect between Metro-North, New York City Transit, and the Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: LIRR planned shutdown during blizzard

payload.description: Long Island Rail Road implemented a planned, orderly shutdown at 1:00 a.m. on Monday due to the blizzard (Winter Storm Hernando)

tool_args.label: Siemens $120.95M non-competitive contract for ATS-B upgrades

payload.claim_text: C&D requests Board approval to award a non-competitive contract to Siemens Mobility Inc. for ATS-B enhancements and 5G-based Data Communication System equipment for 347 R160 and 73 R179 subway trains, in the amount of $120,950,000 and duration of 1,095 calendar days
payload.subject: MTA C&D

tool_args.label: Skanska Walsh Traylor $1.015B design-build award for SAS Phase 2

payload.claim_text: C&D requests Board approval to award a design-build contract to Skanska Walsh Traylor SAS2-C3 Joint Venture for excavation and construction of structural shells for the 106th Street Station and connecting tunnels for SAS Phase 2, in the amount of $1,015,340,000 and duration of 1,582 calendar days
payload.subject: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2

tool_args.label: LIRR storm response: 1800+ employees worked through blizzard

payload.claim_text: More than 1,800 employees worked through the historic storm, operating and maintaining four de-icer trains, multiple patrol trains, and 15 pieces of on-track snow clearing equipment, clearing snow from switches, third rail, platforms, yards, and parking lots across 126 stations and 700 miles of track
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: SAS Phase 2 easement costs $640K and license $180K

payload.claim_text: The cost of the easement and the construction license were determined by independent appraisal and are $640,000 and $180,000, respectively
payload.subject: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2

tool_args.label: Smith-Ninth Street escalator replacement with crane operation

payload.claim_text: New escalator units were craned through the station roof and lowered into place at Smith-Ninth Street station - the highest elevated subway station in the Western Hemisphere - on the F and G lines
payload.subject: MTA C&D

2025-2029 Capital Program total
Subway crime at lowest in 16 years in 2025

payload.claim_text: Subway crime in 2025 fell 5% from 2024 and 14% compared to 2019. Over the last five years, major crimes per one million riders have been cut in half.
payload.subject: MTA NYCT

tool_args.label: Automated Camera Enforcement expanded to 1400+ buses in 2025

payload.claim_text: By year's end, more than 1,400 buses were ACE-equipped, covering 560 miles of routes across all five boroughs and benefiting over 980,000 daily riders. Bus speeds increased by an average of 5%, collisions dropped by 20%, and blocked bus stops were reduced by 40%.
payload.subject: MTA NYCT

tool_args.label: Congestion pricing one-year results

payload.claim_text: One year after congestion relief began on January 5, 2025, the program reached its projected $500 million revenue target in the first year, with about 73,000 fewer vehicles entering the Congestion Relief Zone daily, morning rush hour traffic speeds up 23%, and air pollutants down 22%
payload.subject: MTA

tool_args.label: Subway ridership hit 4.65M on Dec 11, 2025 post-pandemic record

payload.claim_text: Subway ridership broke post-pandemic records multiple times, hitting 4.65 million customers on December 11, 2025
payload.subject: MTA NYCT
